source_pr.title: util: gopls modernize
source_pr.body:
<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?
<!--

Please create an issue first to describe the problem.

There MUST be one line starting with "Issue Number:  " and
linking the relevant issues via the "close" or "ref".

For more info, check https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/contribute-code.html#referring-to-an-issue.

-->

Issue Number: close #60784

Problem Summary:

### What changed and how does it work?

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [ ] Unit test
- [ ] Integration test
- [ ] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
- [x] No need to test
  > - [x] no logic changed, existing tests should be enough

Side effects

- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more CPU
- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory
- [ ] Breaking backward compatibility

Documentation

- [ ] Affects user behaviors
- [ ] Contains syntax changes
- [ ] Contains variable changes
- [ ] Contains experimental features
- [ ] Changes MySQL compatibility

### Release note

<!-- compatibility change, improvement, bugfix, and new feature need a release note -->

Please refer to [Release Notes Language Style Guide](https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/release-notes-style-guide.html) to write a quality release note.

```release-note
None
```

symptoms: No concrete flaky failure signature recorded in PR; this is a gopls modernize/refactor change.
failure_signature: No concrete flaky failure signature recorded in PR; this is a gopls modernize/refactor change.
root_cause_explanation: insufficient_evidence: This PR is a gopls modernize/refactor change across util code and tests. The patch does not provide a concrete flaky symptom with a targeted stabilization fix, so we avoid guessing a root cause.
fix_pattern: Gopls modernize/refactor (e.g. use min/max helpers, slices.Clone/Delete, fmt.Append/Appendf, range loops).

evidence: files: build/nogo_config.json, pkg/util/backoff/backoff.go, pkg/util/checksum/checksum_test.go, pkg/util/chunk/codec.go, pkg/util/chunk/column_test.go, pkg/util/chunk/row_in_disk.go, pkg/util/deadlockhistory/deadlock_history.go, pkg/util/domainutil/repair_vars.go, pkg/util/execdetails/execdetails.go, pkg/util/extsort/disk_sorter.go, pkg/util/generic/sync_map_test.go, pkg/util/hint/hint.go, pkg/util/intset/fast_int_set_test.go, pkg/util/memory/tracker.go, pkg/util/mock/iter_test.go, pkg/util/prefix_helper_test.go, pkg/util/ranger/context/context.go, pkg/util/ranger/points.go, pkg/util/schemacmp/lattice.go, pkg/util/selection/selection.go, pkg/util/stmtsummary/v2/stmtsummary_benchmark_test.go, pkg/util/topsql/reporter/datamodel.go, pkg/util/watcher/watcher.go, pkg/util/workloadrepo/worker.go, pkg/util/workloadrepo/worker_test.go
